title: Ancient Scorpion applies 20 damage over 3 turn cycles on hit

card.rawText: When this creature hits, the targeted creature receives 20 damage, once per turn cycle, for 3 turn cycles.

effect.value: When this creature hits, the targeted creature receives 20 damage, once per turn cycle, for 3 turn cycles.

plan.title: Ancient Scorpion applies 20 damage over 3 turn cycles on hit
plan.summary: Run Ancient Scorpion through a hit and verify the targeted creature receives a 20 damage recurring effect for 3 turn cycles.

notes: Read text first: When this creature hits, the targeted creature receives 20 damage, once per turn cycle, for 3 turn cycles.

steps: Verify the defender receives the three-cycle 20 damage effect.

expectedAssertions.label: Ancient Scorpion recurring damage effect applied
